sn22.120:1.1: Near Sāvatthi. There the Blessed One said,
sn22.120:1.2: “Monks, I will teach you the phenomena that are conducive to fettering and the fetter.
sn22.120:1.3: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.” “As you say, lord, the monks responded to him. The Blessed One said,
sn22.120:1.4: “And which are the phenomena conducive to fettering? And which is the fetter?
sn22.120:1.5: “Form, monks, is a phenomenon conducive to fettering.
sn22.120:1.6: Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the fetter there.
sn22.120:1.7: “Feeling is a phenomenon conducive to fettering. Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the fetter there.
sn22.120:1.8: “Perception is a phenomenon conducive to fettering. Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the fetter there.
sn22.120:1.9: “Fabrications are phenomena conducive to fettering. Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the fetter there.
sn22.120:1.10: “Consciousness is a phenomenon conducive to fettering.
sn22.120:1.11: Whatever desire-passion is there, that is the fetter there.
sn22.120:1.12: “These are called the phenomena conducive to fettering. This is the fetter.”
